title: Croatian Keto Hash
description: A keto-friendly twist on the classic hash dish, featuring crispy croatian and hash browns. Perfect for a low-carb breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Croatian Sausage
ingredients.notes: look for a sugar-free and low-carb option

ingredients.name: Hash Browns
ingredients.notes: make sure they are low-carb and unsweetened

ingredients.name: Crispy Bacon
ingredients.notes: look for a sugar-free and low-carb option

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: make sure it's a low-carb option

instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. Cut the Croatian sausage into 1-inch pieces.
4. Place the sausage pieces on the prepared baking sheet.
5. Bake the sausage in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
6. While the sausage is baking, dice the hash browns into 1-inch pieces.
7. In a large skillet, cook the diced hash browns over medium heat until they're golden brown.
8. Add the crispy bacon to the skillet and cook until crispy.
9. In a large bowl, combine the cooked sausage, hash browns, and bacon.
10. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the top of the mixture.
11. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with chopped scallions.
